utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: You did look like an idiot .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey , I was not the only one who looked like an idiot .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Remember when Ross tried to say , " Butternut squash ? "

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And it came out , " Squatternut buash ? "

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: That is it . That is my worse Thanksgiving .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh wait ! That can not be the one Rachel talking about . She did not even know that happened . So which one was it ?

emotion_cause.span: 8_That can not be the one Rachel talking about . She did not even know that happened . So which one was it ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Umm , I ... I really do not want to tell this story .

emotion_cause.span: 9_I ... I really do not want to tell this story .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh , come on Monica , reliving past pain and getting depressed is what Thanksgiving is all about .

emotion_cause.span: 9_I ... I really do not want to tell this story .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Look umm , of all people , you do not want me to tell this story !
